config.purpose: verify the one-hot anchor-select reformulation eliminates the bf16 scatter_add_ backward slow-path that dominated piecewise_kmeans m=4 training on LRA ListOps (A100, seq 2000, batch 32)

history.note: compare against results/lra/listops/warmup_backward_attribution.json (pre-fix): bf16/fp32 ratio was 2.57 (bf16 SLOWER), scatter_add_ was 86.8% of backward CUDA time. Post-fix the ratio is 0.75 (bf16 FASTER, normal tensor-core behavior) and scatter_add_ is absent from the top-8 CUDA ops.

profiler_top_cuda_ops_bf16_fwdbwd_postfi.role: low-collision bucket gather (n->m*C), NOT the eliminated high-collision anchor scatter_add_

history.eliminated: aten::scatter_add_ (was 86.8% of backward CUDA time pre-fix) no longer appears in the top-8
